title: Why Did Zevra Therapeutics (ZVRA) Stock Move Up +17.86% Today?
author: tickeron_community
selftext: Zevra Therapeutics, Inc. ([ZVRA](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ZVRA/)) is a commercial-stage rare disease biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing treatments for serious medical conditions, most notably MIPLYFFA® (arimoclomol) for Niemann-Pick disease type C — an ultra-rare, progressive, and fatal neurological disorder. On March 10, 2026, shares of [ZVRA](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ZVRA/) surged approximately **+17.86%**, rising from a prior closing price of $9.36 to trade around $11.03 during the morning session. The move was triggered by the company's pre-market release of Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, which materially outpaced Wall Street expectations on both the top and bottom lines.
